# Install Substrate Artifact Index

These profile artifacts capture the clean-room install substrate wiring from published manifests only. Import probes are intentionally skipped in this local artifact set because the current container does not provide the full published `tigrbl` dependency stack or the complete supported Python runtime matrix.

| Profile | Static manifest passed | Failure count |
| --- | --- | ---: |
| `base` | `True` | `0` |
| `devtest` | `True` | `0` |
| `final-certification` | `True` | `0` |
| `migration-portability` | `True` | `0` |
| `postgres-hypercorn` | `True` | `0` |
| `release-gates` | `True` | `0` |
| `sqlite-uvicorn` | `True` | `0` |
| `test-conformance` | `True` | `0` |
| `test-core` | `True` | `0` |
| `test-extension` | `True` | `0` |
| `test-integration` | `True` | `0` |
| `test-interop` | `True` | `0` |
| `test-security-negative` | `True` | `0` |
| `tigrcorn` | `True` | `0` |
